pattern: Some effect summaries use fullwidth labels （2） while probability cells use halfwidth labels (2), so probability boost extraction missed VU-only activation probability additions.
resolution: Normalize label brackets before checking for (2) and build activation_probability_boost from labeled probability cells only when 発動率増加/上昇 is the effect.

pattern: A single effect cell can contain multiple labeled percentages such as (1)16% (2)4.5%.
resolution: Split multiple labeled percent values and infer the effect kind from the matching labeled condition segment.

pattern: Skill disable effects sometimes have no numeric value column and only appear in the labeled condition text.
resolution: Allow condition-only skill_disable components, and drop unlabeled duplicate condition components when a labeled component of the same effect kind exists.

pattern: Remarks can declare a label as Lv92+ only, for example (2)はLv.92以降で発動, while parser values may accidentally cover pre-VU levels.
resolution: Add vu_label_level_mismatch_needs_review as a blocking health reason instead of silently treating the component as parsed.

pattern: VU additions can be written as (2) (1)+30, meaning a delta on the primary fixed damage value.
resolution: Parse labeled (1)+N deltas as additional_fixed_damage when the labeled condition segment is about fixed damage.
